zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace於1162年5月22日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅時，她的父親Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne25歲，母親Marie de Blois26歲。她於大約1179年與Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1184年被列為duchess of brabant。她去世於1210年10月16日在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年48歲，埋葬在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace于1162年5月22日出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅时，她的父亲Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne25岁，母亲Marie de Blois26岁。她于大约1179年与Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1184年被列为duchess of brabant。她去世于1210年10月16日在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年48岁，埋葬在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace was born on 22 May 1162, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, was 25 and her mother, Marie de Blois, was 26. She married Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen about 1179. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. In 1184, her occupation is listed as duchess of brabant. She died on 16 October 1210, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 48, and was buried in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace est née le 22 mai 1162, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marie de Blois, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen environ 1179. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. En 1184, la profession de sa indiquée est duchess of brabant. Elle est décédée le 16 octobre 1210, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace am 22. Mai 1162 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne 25 und ihre Mutter Marie de Blois 26. Sie hat um 1179 Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1184 ist ihr Beruf als duchess of brabant aufgeführt. Sie starb am 16. Oktober 1210 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien und wurde in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.Bergen op Zoom, Noord-Brabant, Netherlan: Bergen op Zoom, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi
it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace è nata il il 22 maggio 1162 nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Marie de Blois, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen circa 1179. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1184, la sua occupazione è indicata come duchess of brabant. Morì il 16 ottobre 1210, nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsaceが1162年5月22日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogneは25歳，母Marie de Bloisは26歳であった。約1179年にHendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1184年，職業はduchess of brabantと記録されている。彼女は1210年10月16日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで48歳で死去し，ベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace(이)가 1162년 5월 22일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Blois(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1179년 Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1184년, 그녀의 직업은 duchess of brabant이었다. 그녀는 1210년 10월 16일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace nasceu em 22 de maio de 1162, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Blois, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen aproximadamente 1179. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1184, sua profissão aparece como duchess of brabant. Ela faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1210, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.

ro.Bergen op Zoom, Noord-Brabant, Netherlan: Bergen op Zoom, Noord-Brabant, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace родилась 22 мая 1162 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Blois, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen около 1179 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1184 году она работала по профессии duchess of brabant. Она умерла 16 октября 1210 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace nació el 22 de mayo de 1162, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Marie de Blois, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen aproximadamente 1179. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1184, su ocupación registrada era duchess of brabant. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1210, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica.
